title: The Asteroid with Two Heads

scenes.text: There’s an asteroid out there with two distinct heads.
This unique shape presents challenges for space travel and landing operations.
Captured by Japan’s Hayabusa2 probe, this asteroid is 62 million miles away.
Studying it could unveil secrets about the formation of our solar system.
scenes.label: UNLOCKING SOLAR SYSTEM SECRETS

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Meet the two-headed asteroid, a rare cosmic object that may hold clues to our solar system's history. Follow for daily science!
